commit.subject: Fix enemy groups in Lost Mines

diff_evidence.commit_message:
Fix enemy groups in Lost Mines

The `number` key requires 2 values now, a min and a max. For each group, I
made the min and the max the same, which I think should mimic the old
behavior. As far as I know, this is the only map that was broken this way.

commit.subject: Redesign Family Crypt quest

diff_evidence.commit_message:
Redesign Family Crypt quest

- Player is no longer trapped in the map, and can come and go as they
  please. The quest name hasn't changed, since *Ardwen* can be the one
  that's trapped in the crypt. The player's just freeing them from their
  misery :)
- Quest items can be stored in private stash (see #827)
- The quest rings as well as the awarded "Ardwen's Ring" all provide
  some small bonuses.

diff_evidence.commit_message:
Fix Ardwen quest bugs

- Fixed chest room not being unlocked if the player already completed
  the quest.

commit.subject: fantasycore: Fix incorrect loot animations for various item types

diff_evidence.commit_message:
fantasycore: Fix incorrect loot animations for various item types

- belt has an animation, so we don't need to use cloth armor
- rings have an animation, so we don't need to use the gem
- scrolls have an animation, so we don't need to use the book

commit.subject: Empyrean: Fix floor gaps near wall tiles in grassland/cave maps

diff_evidence.commit_message:
Empyrean: Fix floor gaps near wall tiles in grassland/cave maps

In the past, the wall tiles from these tilesets did not have the black
"mask" that covered the non-visible portion. This meant that we couldn't
draw floor tiles under them, as the floor would show on the back side.
However, this meant that there would be no floor on the *visible* side,
either.

But we have the masks now, so this commit fills in those gaps. The
automap rulesets have also been updated so that new maps will have the
floors filled correctly.
